visualization.description: Scatter plot showcasing all players from the dataset. The x-axis represents fantasy points achieved, and the y-axis denotes match outcomes. Points are color-coded by outcome and sized by runs scored.

effect.description: Filter range of fantasy points selected on the x-axis to narrow down player data in exploration views.

visualization.description: Bar chart displaying combined batting and bowling metrics for players. Bar segments are color-coded to denote match outcomes.

views.components: Add dropdown menus to toggle between runs and wickets metrics for sorting and filtering.

effect.description: Switch visibility between batting and bowling statistics.

visualization.description: Tick chart showcasing individual matches with extreme performances for runs scored or wickets taken.

effect.description: Highlight match IDs for selected extreme performances to pass as context to insight views.

visualization.description: Bar chart ranking match winners by total boundaries scored and identifying the impact of player-of-match awards.

views.components: Add hover functionality to display details of player-of-match contributing to the victory.

effect.description: Show contextual details for the player of the match and match impact metrics.

outputs.path: The user begins by browsing View 1 at the [Overview] level to observe the overall distribution of players' fantasy points and match outcomes. Next, they select a range of fantasy points on the x-axis in View 1, causing View 2 to filter for associated player statistics at the [Exploration] level. Then, the user toggles between batting and bowling metrics in View 2 and drills into individual matches in View 3 at the [Detail] level to focus on extreme performances for runs scored or wickets taken. Finally, highlighted match IDs from View 3 are passed to View 4 at the [Insight] level to uncover broader impacts of player contributions on match results and team victories, visualized through aggregated metrics like boundaries and player-of-match effects.
